extraction.one_line_summary: KENNAUGH Peter won from the breakaway on Col de la Croix de Fer, while PORTE Richie dropped FROOME Chris 2km from finish gaining 40 seconds on contenders.
tactical_patterns: PORTE Richie attacked FROOME Chris precisely 2km before finish on final ascent, revealing superior form and specific distance preference.
CLARKE Simon deployed at front for TALANSKY Andrew by team Cannondale, demonstrating domestique sacrifice pattern for GC protection.
BOUWMAN Koen targeted intermediate mountain points despite being in breakaway, prioritizing jersey over stage win maximizes classification value.
KENNAUGH Peter dropped SWIFT Ben before final descent, understanding need to eliminate superior sprinter before technical finish section.

rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: Dropped FROOME Chris 2km from finish, gaining 40 seconds on all GC rivals including CONTADOR and MARTIN Dan
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: Unable to follow PORTE Richie in final 2km, losing 40 seconds suggests suboptimal pre-Tour form
rider_signals.KENNAUGH Peter: positive: Soloed to victory after dropping SWIFT Ben on final climb, showing exceptional climbing form
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: neutral: Finished fifth, one minute down, but commentary suggests no significant weakening on final climb
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: Explicitly mentioned as suffering on final ascent, losing time to PORTE Richie in overall ranking
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: negative: Suffered on final ascent alongside CONTADOR, dropped in overall ranking behind KENNAUGH Peter
rider_signals.SWIFT Ben: neutral: Resisted attacks mid-climb but dropped before descent, confirming climbing limitations despite good positioning
rider_signals.BOUWMAN Koen: positive: Aggressively collected mountain points from breakaway, demonstrating classification ambition and climbing consistency
rider_signals.TALANSKY Andrew: neutral: Attempted solo attack with CLARKE Simon support but bridged back, showing ambition but insufficient power
